settings.title: Settings
settings.language.label: Interface language
settings.language.helper: Pick a language for the interface. Date and number formats follow your system locale.
settings.language.cardHelper: Pick a language for the interface. Translations are community-driven - missing strings fall back to English.
settings.display.helper: Theme and base font size. System theme follows your OS preference.
settings.fontScale.helper: Bumps the base font size. Use Large or X-Large when viewing on a TV from across the room.
settings.fontScale.label: Font scale
settings.perfMode.title: Performance mode
settings.perfMode.label: Performance mode
settings.perfMode.helperLong: Disables decorative animations (the comet in the sidebar, hub entry stagger, sliding focus ring) for smoother scrolling and D-pad navigation on TV boxes and low-end devices.
settings.closeBehavior.title: Close button behavior
settings.closeBehavior.label: Close button
settings.closeBehavior.helper: What happens when you click the window's X. "Minimize to tray" keeps the app running in the system tray so background features (programme reminders, downloads) keep working. "Quit" exits the app like other windows.
settings.theme.label: Theme
settings.danger.resetConfirm: Reset everything? This wipes playlists, favorites, recents, downloads metadata, and cached catalogs. The action cannot be undone.
tray.notice.title: Still running in the tray
tray.notice.body: Extreme InfiniTV keeps running in the system tray. Click the tray icon to open it again, or right-click for Quit.
welcome.heading: Pick something to watch.
welcome.sub: Connect an IPTV subscription, or paste a playlist URL. Channels, movies, and series will appear here.
welcome.fineprint: This app does not provide any content. The demo loads a public playlist from iptv-org.
error.connectivity: Couldn't reach the provider. Check your connection.
favorites.empty: No favorites yet. Star a channel, movie, or series to see it here.
hub.tile.livetv.sub: Channels, and what's on right now.
login.subtitle: Connect an Xtream provider, paste an M3U/M3U8 URL, or load a playlist file from your device.
login.subtitle.demo: A free public playlist from iptv-org. You can remove it any time.
login.field.title: Title
login.field.serverUrl.helper: Paste a full player_api.php URL to auto-fill the fields below, or enter just the hostname.
login.field.playlistUrl.helper: Any http(s) URL that serves an M3U playlist. Extension optional.
login.field.localFile.helper: Pick a .m3u or .m3u8 file from your device. The contents are stored with this playlist so you can keep watching without re-picking the file.
login.epg.advancedHelper: Override the provider's XMLTV guide, or stack extra sources to fill missing channels.
login.epg.primaryHelper: XMLTV URL. Plain XML or gzipped (.xml.gz). Overrides the auto-detected source.
login.epg.primaryPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the provider's default
login.epg.additionalHelper: Stacked in order. Each one fills channels the previous sources didn't supply - they never override the primary.
login.epg.invalidUrl: Must start with http:// or https:// and contain no spaces.
login.epg.duplicateUrl: Duplicate URL - same as another source.
login.epg.testNoSources: Nothing to test - add at least one URL first.
login.epg.disableProviderLabel: Don't use the provider's default EPG
login.epg.disableProviderHelper: Skip the auto-detected source. Only the URLs above will be used - lets you verify a custom EPG works on its own.
login.mirrors.helper: Providers often hand out a couple of domains. We'll fall back automatically when the primary stops responding.
login.advanced.helper: Tweak how stream URLs are built. Only change if your provider needs it.
login.field.liveContainer.helper: Most providers use HLS. Switch to MPEG-TS only if your provider can't serve .m3u8.
backup.failoverNoticeBody: Your primary domain stopped responding. We switched to a backup so you can keep watching.
epg.map.title: Map channels to EPG
epg.map.help: Each channel below is matched to an EPG entry by tvg-id. Use override to point a channel at a different EPG channel manually.
epg.map.listEmptyPlaylist: No channels in this playlist yet. Open Live TV first so the channel list loads.
epg.map.pickerEmpty: No EPG channels match your search.
epg.map.pickerHelp: Choose which XMLTV channel supplies programmes for this entry.
epg.map.noEpgChannels: EPG hasn't loaded yet - refresh the schedule first, then come back.
login.fineprint: This app does not provide any content. Use any Xtream-compatible IPTV subscription, or paste any M3U/M3U8 playlist URL. Public test playlists are available at iptv-org.github.io/iptv.
login.status.privateHostHint: The browser may block private-network requests - try the desktop app.
login.status.fillFields: Please fill server URL, username and password.
login.status.allRequired: Server URL, username and password are required.
login.status.schemeSwappedHttp: Switched to HTTP - your provider doesn't support HTTPS.
login.status.schemeSwappedHttps: Switched to HTTPS - your provider redirects HTTP.
login.status.m3uScheme: M3U URL must start with http:// or https://.
login.status.demoPrefilled: Demo URL prefilled. Hit Save and continue.
login.status.localNotM3u: That file doesn't look like an M3U playlist.
login.status.localTooLarge: File is too large ({size} bytes). Pick a playlist under 25 MB.
login.demo.title: Demo (iptv-org)
page.movies.title: Movies
page.series.title: Series
page.epg.title: Programme guide
page.search.title: Search
page.favorites.title: Favorites
page.watchlist.title: Watch later
page.recentlyAdded.title: Recently added
page.downloads.title: Downloads
page.livetv.title: Live TV
sort.label: Sort
epg.heading: Programme guide
epg.helper: Live programmes for the active playlist. Use Today / arrows to scrub through the schedule.
epg.timezoneHelper: Some providers ship XMLTV with timestamps already shifted to the server's local time, so EPG times look off. Auto-detect picks the offset where the most channels have a programme airing right now.
epg.noEpg: No programme guide for this playlist yet.
search.empty: Type to search across channels, movies, and series.
downloads.notify.complete.title: Download complete
favorites.heading: Favorites
favorites.helperEmpty: No favorites yet. Star a channel, movie, or series to see it here.
watchlist.heading: Watch later
recentlyAdded.heading: Recently added
page.favorites.heading: Favorites
page.favorites.sub: Every starred channel, movie, and series across all your playlists. Opening a favorite from a different playlist switches you over first.
page.watchlist.heading: Watch later
page.watchlist.sub: Movies and series saved for later, across all your playlists. Newest first.
page.recentlyAdded.heading: Recently added
page.recentlyAdded.sub: Latest movies and series from your active playlist, newest first.
page.search.heading: Find anything
page.search.sub: Channels, movies, and series from the active playlist. Press {kbd} from anywhere to jump back here.
page.search.subPrefix: Channels, movies, and series from the active playlist. Press
page.search.subSuffix: from anywhere to jump back here.
page.epg.sub: What's on right now and what's coming up across the active playlist's channels.
page.downloads.sub: Manage downloads, queue items, and finished files.
livetv.epgToggle.aria: Show EPG for the current channel
livetv.epgToggle.title: Show EPG
livetv.openSchedule.aria: Open the full EPG schedule grid
livetv.openSchedule.title: Open schedule grid
livetv.openSchedule.label: Schedule grid
livetv.pickChannelHelper: Choose from the list, or change category.
downloads.summary.intro: Movies and series episodes you save will appear here.
downloads.throughput.heading: Throughput
downloads.empty.heading: No downloaded files yet.
downloads.empty.helper: Open a movie or series episode and tap Download to save it here.
downloads.delete.title: Delete this download?
downloads.delete.body: The file will be removed from disk.
settings.health.title: Active playlist health
settings.health.helper: Last successful catalog fetch, account status, and provider responsiveness for the currently selected playlist.
settings.health.empty: No active playlist. Select one in the Playlists section to view its health.
settings.livetvLayout.title: Live TV layout
settings.livetvLayout.helper: How channels and the EPG appear on the Live TV page.
settings.epgTimezone.title: EPG time zone
settings.network.title: Network
settings.network.helper: User-Agent for provider requests. Some servers reject identical UAs.
settings.playback.title: Playback
settings.playback.helper: Choose how streams open. External players play 4K and HDR more reliably.
settings.playback.backend.videojsHelper: Mature HTML5 player with broad codec support.
settings.playback.backend.artplayerHelpe: Lightweight HTML5 player powered by ArtPlayer + hls.js.
settings.playback.reuseHelper: Open new streams in the same MPV window.
settings.playback.reuseHelperVlc: Open new streams in the same VLC window. The first stream's settings apply for the session.
settings.playback.notConfigured: {player} isn't configured. Set its path in Settings → Playback.
settings.playback.error.not_found: {player} not found at {path}. Install it or set a custom path.
settings.playback.error.permission: {path} isn't executable. Check the file permissions.
settings.playback.error.timeout: {player} didn't respond in time. Is the path correct?
settings.playback.androidNoHandler: No app on this device can play this stream. Install VLC or MX Player.
settings.playback.androidNoBridge: External playback isn't available on this device.
settings.discord.title: Discord Rich Presence
settings.discord.helper: Show what you're watching in your Discord profile. Desktop only.
settings.downloadsSection.title: Downloads
settings.downloadsSection.helper: Where downloaded files go and how many run at once.
settings.categories.title: Categories
settings.categories.helper: Hide categories you never use, or pick a small set to focus on.
settings.favoritesSection.title: Favorites
settings.backup.title: Backup
settings.backup.helper: Export and import all your settings, playlists, favorites, and progress as a single JSON file.
settings.storage.title: Storage
settings.progressRetention.title: Continue watching
settings.progressRetention.label: Continue Watching retention
settings.progressRetention.helper: How long to keep paused movies and episodes in Continue Watching. Older entries are dropped on the next save. The 200-item cap still applies regardless.
settings.about.title: Extreme InfiniTV
settings.support.title: Like the app?
settings.support.helper: Star the project on GitHub or sponsor development.
settings.danger.heading: Reset everything
settings.danger.helper: Wipes all playlists, favorites, recents, downloads metadata, and cached catalogs from this device. The action cannot be undone.
detail.error.noPlaylist: No playlist is selected. Add one in Settings.
detail.error.noStream: Couldn't get a stream URL for this movie.
detail.error.providerLocal: Couldn't reach the provider. Local copy is available - tap Play.
detail.error.failedTryPlay: Failed to load movie info. Try Play anyway.
detail.error.localAvailable: Local copy is available - tap Play.
detail.download.tooltipNoTauri: Open the source URL in a new tab (desktop app saves to disk)
detail.download.waitingSlot: Waiting for a slot - tap to cancel
providerError.title: Can't reach {provider}
providerError.sub: We couldn't load the {noun}. Your connection, the provider, or your login may be the cause.
series.error.providerLocal: Couldn't reach the provider. Downloaded episodes are still playable.
series.download.tooltip: Save this episode to your downloads folder
stream.error.checkConnection: Check your connection or try another channel.
stream.error.schemeUnsupported: Can't play "{scheme}://" streams in the embedded player. Set up MPV or VLC in Settings → Playback.
stream.offline.title: You are offline
stream.offline.reconnectFailedBody: Reconnected, but couldn't refresh the catalog. Check your playlist or try again.
epg.loadingFull: Loading EPG · large providers can take a moment
epg.noPlaylistSelected: No playlist selected. Add one from the header.
epg.noFavoritesEpg: No favorite channels with EPG ids. Star a channel on Live TV first.
epg.noRecentsEpg: No recently watched channels with EPG ids. Play one on Live TV first.
epg.noCategoryEpg: No channels in this category have EPG ids. Try a different category.
epg.openLivetvFirst: Open Live TV first so the M3U channel list is loaded - it's too big to refetch from this page.
epg.noProgrammesMatched: EPG loaded, but no programmes matched any channel id. The provider might use different tvg-ids than your playlist - try "Map channels" to fix it manually.
epg.noChannelsMatchedHint: None of these channels auto-match an EPG entry. Click "Map channels" in the toolbar above to point them at EPG channels manually.
epg.sidePanelNoMapping: No EPG for this channel. Open the EPG page and use "Map channels" to point it at an EPG entry.
epg.sidePanelEmpty: EPG loaded, but no programmes for this channel's tvg-id.
expiration.expiredOn: Account expired on {date}. Contact your provider to renew.
keyboardHelp.title: Keyboard shortcuts
keyboardHelp.desc.movePage: Move a page at a time
movies.requiresXtream: Movies require an Xtream playlist. Switch playlists from the header.
series.requiresXtream: Series require an Xtream playlist. Switch playlists from the header.
streamTest.title: Stream test
streamTest.summary.nonHttp: {scheme}:// streams can't be probed from the browser. Play in MPV or VLC to verify.
streamTest.headRejected: HEAD rejected ({reason}) - used range GET fallback.
streamTest.summary.playlistOk.master: Master playlist OK; first segment reachable.
streamTest.summary.playlistOk.media: Media playlist OK; first segment reachable.
epg.showingFirst: Showing first {n} channels in this category. Filter to see others.
page.settings.sub: Playlists, preferences, cache, and the app itself.
settings.livetvLayout.helperLong: Defaults for the channel sidebar and the EPG panel on Live TV. The EPG button on the page itself still toggles per session.
settings.network.helperLong: Some IPTV providers reject the default browser User-Agent. Pick a preset or enter a custom string. Applies to provider API, M3U, and EPG fetches. Effective in the desktop build.
settings.discord.helperLong: Show "Watching X on Extreme InfiniTV" on your Discord profile while you use the app. On by default; uncheck a playlist below to mute presence for that account. Desktop only - requires Discord running on the same machine.
settings.downloadsFolder.intro: Folder where new downloads land. Manage the queue itself on the Downloads page.
settings.downloadsFolder.notSetPlacehold: Not set - picked on first download
settings.downloadsFolder.restoreHelper: After a reinstall, scan the folder above for `.xtmeta.json` sidecars and re-add the matching files to your downloads list.
settings.downloadsFolder.concurrencyHelp: Most Xtream providers cap connections per account, so a second parallel download fails mid-stream. Keep this at 1 unless your provider explicitly allows multiple slots.
settings.categories.helperLong: Per-playlist mute list. Hidden categories are hidden from the picker and the main grid on Live TV, Movies, and Series.
settings.favoritesSection.helperLong: Reorder your favorites per kind. The hub Favorites strip and the per-page favorites filter follow this order.
settings.backup.helperLong: Save all playlists, favorites, recents, watched progress, hidden categories, and app settings to a file. Cache and the downloads queue are not exported.
settings.storage.helperLong: Clears channel, movie, and series lists. Playlists, favorites, and recents are kept.
settings.about.linuxAppImageNotice: Auto-updates on Linux are only delivered to the AppImage build. For deb / rpm installs, grab new versions from the GitHub releases page above.
settings.help.docsIntro: Step-by-step guides for sign-in, external players, the keyboard and D-pad bindings, and the most common things people get stuck on.
settings.hubStrips.title: Home page sections
settings.hubStrips.helper: Choose which sections appear on your home page and what order they're in.
settings.hubStrips.emptyActive: No sections on the home page yet. Add one below.
settings.help.title: Found a bug or have a suggestion?
settings.help.intro: Bug reports, feature requests, questions, and general feedback all go to GitHub - search existing issues first, or pick a template and open a new one.
settings.support.intro: Extreme InfiniTV is free and open source. If it saves you time or sweetens your living-room setup, a small tip helps cover hosting, signing certs, and the next round of features.
settings.support.fineprint: No tracking, no ads, no telemetry - just a thank-you button.
settings.danger.helperLong: Wipes all app data: playlists, cached lists, favorites, recents, and locally stored EPG references. Next launch starts from a clean slate.
settings.danger.dialogBody: This wipes all playlists, favorites, recents, and cached lists. This can't be undone.
settings.hiddenCategories.title: Hidden categories
settings.hiddenCategories.helperLong: Hidden categories don't appear in the picker or main grid. Use the eye icon on a category row to hide it; unhide here.
settings.hiddenCategories.emptyState: No hidden categories for this playlist.
settings.favoritesReorder.title: Favorites order
settings.favoritesReorder.helperLong: Drag a row, or use the up/down buttons. The hub Favorites strip and per-page lists follow this order.
settings.favoritesReorder.emptyState: Star a channel, movie, or series to add it here.
search.warmingHint: Search will fill in as data arrives.
search.warmingResultsHint: Results will fill in as data arrives.
search.helpKbd: Enter to open the top result · ↑↓ to move · Esc to clear
search.showingTop: Showing the top {n}. Refine your query to narrow further.
list.noPlaylistsCta: No playlists yet. Add one to start watching.
epg.cat.syncWithLiveHelp: Use the same hidden / allowed categories you set on Live TV.
settings.update.downloadFailed: Download failed - {error}. Click Re-download to start over.
